2223630.name: Squadron
2223630.description:
Squadron immerses you in a dark and mysterious universe where a multitude of questions can hide. It's up to you to find the answers to the puzzles that will arise, but be careful you will have to travel beyond the limits of the software, which knows a Redit post, or even a steam account can hide answers. Arm yourself with a web browser and a good coffee, it's a safe bet that you will experience a more than eventful journey through this private military network.

You will be the hero of a story that unfolds around you in YOUR world who may know that this game is in fact very real.
2223630.supported_languages:
英语, 法语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
